lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਸੰਤ ਸਦਾ ਥਿਰੁ ਪੂਜਹੁ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਾਤ ॥
lines.translit: har ke sant sadaa thir poojahu jo har naam japaat |
lines.english: The Lord's Saints are steady and stable forever; they worship and adore Him, and chant the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਤ ਹੈ ਗੋਬਿਦੁ ਤੇ ਸਤਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਲਾਤ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jin kau kripaa karat hai gobid te satasang milaat |3|
lines.english: Those who are mercifully blessed by the Lord of the Universe, join the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤ ਕਬੀਰੁ ਰਾਮ ਭਜੁ ਬਉਰੇ ਜਨਮੁ ਅਕਾਰਥ ਜਾਤ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: kehat kabeer raam bhaj baure janam akaarath jaat |4|1|
lines.english: Says Kabeer, meditate and vibrate on the Lord, O madman. Your life is uselessly wasting away. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਬਨਿਤਾ ਸੁਤ ਸੰਪਤਿ ਅੰਤਿ ਨ ਚਲਤ ਸੰਗਾਤ ॥
lines.translit: maat pitaa banitaa sut sanpat ant na chalat sangaat |
lines.english: Mother, father, spouse, children and wealth will not go along with you in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੇ ਸੰਤਨ ਕੀ ਹਉ ਚੇਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tere santan kee hau cheree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am the humble slave of Your Saints. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜਾਸ੍ਰਮ ਮਿਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਨੀ ਤੇਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: raajaasram mit nahee jaanee teree |
lines.english: I do not know the limits of Your Royal Ashram.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਸਤੋ ਜਾਇ ਸੁ ਰੋਵਤੁ ਆਵੈ ਰੋਵਤੁ ਜਾਇ ਸੁ ਹਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: hasato jaae su rovat aavai rovat jaae su hasai |
lines.english: The one who goes laughing returns crying, and the one who goes crying returns laughing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਸਤੋ ਹੋਇ ਹੋਇ ਸੋੁ ਊਜਰੁ ਊਜਰੁ ਹੋਇ ਸੁ ਬਸੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: basato hoe hoe so aoojar aoojar hoe su basai |1|
lines.english: What is inhabited becomes deserted, and what is deserted becomes inhabited. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲ ਤੇ ਥਲ ਕਰਿ ਥਲ ਤੇ ਕੂਆ ਕੂਪ ਤੇ ਮੇਰੁ ਕਰਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jal te thal kar thal te kooaa koop te mer karaavai |
lines.english: The water turns into a desert, the desert turns into a well, and the well turns into a mountain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਤੀ ਤੇ ਆਕਾਸਿ ਚਢਾਵੈ ਚਢੇ ਅਕਾਸਿ ਗਿਰਾਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dharatee te aakaas chadtaavai chadte akaas giraavai |2|
lines.english: From the earth, the mortal is exalted to the Akaashic ethers; and from the ethers on high, he is thrown down again. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੇਖਾਰੀ ਤੇ ਰਾਜੁ ਕਰਾਵੈ ਰਾਜਾ ਤੇ ਭੇਖਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: bhekhaaree te raaj karaavai raajaa te bhekhaaree |
lines.english: The beggar is transformed into a king, and the king into a beggar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਲ ਮੂਰਖ ਤੇ ਪੰਡਿਤੁ ਕਰਿਬੋ ਪੰਡਿਤ ਤੇ ਮੁਗਧਾਰੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: khal moorakh te panddit karibo panddit te mugadhaaree |3|
lines.english: The idiotic fool is transformed into a Pandit, a religious scholar, and the Pandit into a fool. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਕਬੀਰ ਸਾਧੂ ਕੋ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: kahu kabeer saadhoo ko preetam tis moorat balihaaree |4|2|
lines.english: Says Kabeer, God is the Beloved of the Holy Saints. I am a sacrifice to His image. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਰੀ ਤੇ ਜੋ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਕਰਾਵੈ ਪੁਰਖਨ ਤੇ ਜੋ ਨਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: naaree te jo purakh karaavai purakhan te jo naaree |
lines.english: The woman is transformed into a man, and the men into women.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰੰਗ ਬਾਣੀ ਨਾਮਦੇਉ ਜੀ ਕੀ ॥
lines.translit: saarang baanee naamadeo jee kee |
lines.english: Saarang, The Word Of Naam Dayv Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਏਂ ਰੇ ਮਨ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਬਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kaaen re man bikhiaa ban jaae |
lines.english: O mortal, why are you going into the forest of corruption?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸੇ ਮੀਨੁ ਪਾਨੀ ਮਹਿ ਰਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: jaise meen paanee meh rahai |
lines.english: You are like a fish living in the water;

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੂਲੌ ਰੇ ਠਗਮੂਰੀ ਖਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhoolau re tthagamooree khaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You have been misled into eating the toxic drug. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੇ ਕਨਿਕ ਕਾਮਨੀ ਬਾਧਿਓ ਮੋਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aise kanik kaamanee baadhio moh |1|
lines.english: You are bound by attachment to wealth and woman. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹਬਾ ਸੁਆਦੀ ਲੀਲਿਤ ਲੋਹ ॥
lines.translit: jihabaa suaadee leelit loh |
lines.english: Trying to taste the flavor, you swallow the hook.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲ ਜਾਲ ਕੀ ਸੁਧਿ ਨਹੀ ਲਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: kaal jaal kee sudh nahee lahai |
lines.english: you do not see the net of death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਧੁ ਲੀਨੋ ਮੁਖਿ ਦੀਨੀ ਛਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: madh leeno mukh deenee chhaar |
lines.english: then someone comes and takes the honey, and throws dust in its mouth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਮਧੁ ਮਾਖੀ ਸੰਚੈ ਅਪਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: jiau madh maakhee sanchai apaar |
lines.english: The bee stores up loads of honey;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਊ ਬਾਛ ਕਉ ਸੰਚੈ ਖੀਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gaoo baachh kau sanchai kheer |
lines.english: The cow stores up loads of milk;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਲਾ ਬਾਂਧਿ ਦੁਹਿ ਲੇਇ ਅਹੀਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: galaa baandh duhi lee aheer |2|
lines.english: then the milkman comes and ties it by its neck and milks it. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਕਾਰਨਿ ਸ੍ਰਮੁ ਅਤਿ ਕਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa kaaran sram at karai |
lines.english: For the sake of Maya, the mortal works very hard.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਮਾਇਆ ਲੈ ਗਾਡੈ ਧਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: so maaeaa lai gaaddai dharai |
lines.english: He takes the wealth of Maya, and buries it in the ground.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਤਿ ਸੰਚੈ ਸਮਝੈ ਨਹੀ ਮੂੜੑ ॥
lines.translit: at sanchai samajhai nahee moorra |
lines.english: He acquires so much, but the fool does not appreciate it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਕਬਹੂ ਨਹੀ ਕਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasangat kabahoo nahee karai |
lines.english: He never joins the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਧਰਤੀ ਤਨੁ ਹੋਇ ਗਇਓ ਧੂੜਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dhan dharatee tan hoe geo dhoorr |3|
lines.english: His wealth remains buried in the ground, while his body turns to dust. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਅਤਿ ਜਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh trisanaa at jarai |
lines.english: He burns in tremendous sexual desire, unresolved anger and desire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤ ਨਾਮਦੇਉ ਤਾ ਚੀ ਆਣਿ ॥
lines.translit: kehat naamadeo taa chee aan |
lines.english: Says Naam Dayv, seek God's Shelter;

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਦਹੁ ਕੀ ਨ ਹੋਡ ਮਾਧਉ ਮੋ ਸਿਉ ॥
lines.translit: badahu kee na hodd maadhau mo siau |
lines.english: Why not make a bet with me, O Lord of Wealth?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਭੈ ਹੋਇ ਭਜੀਐ ਭਗਵਾਨ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: nirabhai hoe bhajeeai bhagavaan |4|1|
lines.english: be fearless, and vibrate on the Lord God. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਨ ਦੇਉ ਦੇਹੁਰਾ ਆਪਨ ਆਪ ਲਗਾਵੈ ਪੂਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: aapan deo dehuraa aapan aap lagaavai poojaa |
lines.english: You Yourself are the deity, and You are the temple of worship. You are the devoted worshipper.

lines.gurmukhi: ਠਾਕੁਰ ਤੇ ਜਨੁ ਜਨ ਤੇ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਖੇਲੁ ਪਰਿਓ ਹੈ ਤੋ ਸਿਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tthaakur te jan jan te tthaakur khel pario hai to siau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: From the master comes the servant, and from the servant, comes the master. This is the game I play with You. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਹਿ ਗਾਵੈ ਆਪਹਿ ਨਾਚੈ ਆਪਿ ਬਜਾਵੈ ਤੂਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: aapeh gaavai aapeh naachai aap bajaavai tooraa |
lines.english: You Yourself sing, and You Yourself dance. You Yourself blow the bugle.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲ ਤੇ ਤਰੰਗ ਤਰੰਗ ਤੇ ਹੈ ਜਲੁ ਕਹਨ ਸੁਨਨ ਕਉ ਦੂਜਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jal te tarang tarang te hai jal kehan sunan kau doojaa |1|
lines.english: From the water, the waves rise up, and from the waves, the water. They are only different by figures of speech. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਸ ਅਨਿੰਨ ਮੇਰੋ ਨਿਜ ਰੂਪ ॥
lines.translit: daas anin mero nij roop |
lines.english: Says God: my slave is devoted only to me; he is in my very image.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤ ਨਾਮਦੇਉ ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰੋ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਜਨੁ ਊਰਾ ਤੂ ਪੂਰਾ ॥੨॥੨॥
lines.translit: kehat naamadeo toon mero tthaakur jan aooraa too pooraa |2|2|
lines.english: Says Naam Dayv, You are my Lord and Master. Your humble servant is imperfect; You are perfect. ||2||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੀ ਬਾਂਧੀ ਭਗਤੁ ਛਡਾਵੈ ਬਾਂਧੈ ਭਗਤੁ ਨ ਛੂਟੈ ਮੋਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: meree baandhee bhagat chhaddaavai baandhai bhagat na chhoottai mohi |
lines.english: The devotee can release anyone from my bondage, but I cannot release anyone from his.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਸਨ ਨਿਮਖ ਤਾਪ ਤ੍ਰਈ ਮੋਚਨ ਪਰਸਤ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਕਰਤ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਕੂਪ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: darasan nimakh taap tree mochan parasat mukat karat grih koop |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The sight of him, even for an instant, cures the three fevers; his touch brings liberation from the deep dark pit of household affairs. ||1||Pause||
